The PR trims OpenClaw agent/Codex/OpenAI prompt guidance, narrows send-only `message` tool schemas, and updates docs, tests, prompt snapshots, and changelog text.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a prompt/schema refactor, not a bug report. Source review, snapshots, and focused tests cover the intended string/schema changes, but there is no failing current-main behavior to reproduce.
